summary: Backend-only testing for Omni Multimodal AI API completed. All 15 pytest tests passed (100%) covering health, auth gating, /auth/me + logout, Whisper /transcribe, Gemma /ask (image), /chat (text), /history listing + sorting + cross-tenant isolation, and /history/{id} delete. Verified no MongoDB _id leaks in any response. All seeded TEST_ users/sessions/history cleaned up after run.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py auth/google sets session cookie with secure=True and samesite=none which requires HTTPS - fine for prod preview but will not work for local http testing (acceptable since ingress is https).

Hardcoded fallback model IDs 'google/gemma-4-31B-it' and 'google/gemma-4-E2B-it' look like placeholder names - verify these are intentional / actually exist on the HF Router; chat test passed so at least 31B-it resolves.
/api/transcribe uses 25MB hard limit which is fine, but reads entire file into memory; for production consider streaming.
Session expiry check converts naive datetimes assuming UTC - acceptable but could be brittle if data is seeded with timezone-aware datetimes (already handled).
auth_google creates a new session row every call (no upsert) which can leak sessions if user logs in repeatedly without logout; consider de-duping by user_id or capping sessions per user.
No rate limiting on /transcribe, /ask, /chat - paid LLM endpoints exposed to authenticated users only but still worth adding a per-user throttle.
test_credentials: No /app/memory/test_credentials.md present. Tests seed their own TEST_ users + session_tokens directly in MongoDB (test_database) via pymongo and clean them up in fixture teardown.
seed_data_creation: Two TEST_ users (A and B) with active sessions seeded per pytest session via conftest.py fixtures; an extra short-lived user for logout test seeded inline. All TEST_ data removed after run (verified: 0 TEST_ docs remaining in users / user_sessions / history).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully green. Frontend not tested (testing_type=backend only). Test file /app/backend/tests/test_omni_api.py is reusable as regression. To re-run: `pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml`. Tests connect to live Mongo via MONGO_URL from /app/backend/.env and external API via REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env. Whisper + Gemma calls each completed in <1s with synthetic 1s silent WAV / 96x96 red JPG - very fast, no need for long timeouts.
